title: More Nonsense Limerick 49
content:
There was an old man on the Border,
    Who lived in the utmost disorder;
    He danced with the cat, 
    And made tea in his hat,
    Which vexed all the folks on the Border.
meaning: About: Edward Lear was an English artist, illustrator and writer known for his literary nonsense, in poetry and prose, and especially his limericks, a form which he popularised.
